reusable_components.description: EXIST in codebase. Can be reused.

items.name: page_url
items.how_to_import: Not applicable - this is a metadata constant from JSON file

items.name: get_printers_by_description
items.what_it_does: Filters and retrieves printer configurations from the config dictionary based on the specified description/state. Searches the 'pie' environment printers and returns a list of dictionaries containing model and serial_number for printers matching the description parameter.

items.name: load_config
items.what_it_does: Loads and parses the YAML configuration file containing all framework settings including printer configurations, credentials, URLs, and test parameters. Returns the complete configuration dictionary.

items.name: login.url
items.how_to_import:
from config_loader import load_config
config = load_config('config.yaml')
base_url = config.get('login', {}).get('url')

items.name: printers.pie
items.how_to_import:
from config_loader import load_config
config = load_config('config.yaml')
printers = config.get('printers', {}).get('pie', [])
items.constant_value: Array of printer configurations with models, serial numbers, and subscription states

items.name: large_wait
items.how_to_import:
from config_loader import load_config
config = load_config('config.yaml')
large_wait_minutes = int(config.get('large_wait', 15))

items.name: execute_click_action
items.what_it_does: Executes a click action on a UI element based on YAML step definition. Loads page metadata, handles navigation expansion, finds control by text or label, switches to iframe if needed, and performs click with support for multiple elements.
items.method_signature: def execute_click_action(self, step: Dict[str, Any]) -> None

items.name: click_control
items.what_it_does: Core click execution method with progressive fallback through multiple locator strategies (XPath, CSS, id, name, aria_label, data_testid, class_name, partial_link_text). Validates control metadata and attempts each strategy until one succeeds.
items.method_signature: def click_control(self, control, multiple, timeout: int = 10)

items.name: execute_verify_action
items.what_it_does: Executes AI-powered visual verification using Azure OpenAI vision model. Takes screenshot if specified, constructs reference image path, formats prompt with variable substitution, calls run_ai_task for AI analysis, and logs results.
items.method_signature: def execute_verify_action(self, step: Dict[str, Any]) -> None

items.name: run_ai_task
items.what_it_does: Performs AI-powered visual verification using Azure OpenAI vision model. Loads reference and test images, encodes to base64, constructs messages for API call, calls Azure OpenAI chat completions API with vision model, handles streaming or non-streaming responses, parses JSON result, and returns validation data.

items.name: take_screenshot
items.what_it_does: Captures a screenshot of the current browser page and saves it to the specified file path. Returns the filename.

items.name: set_variables
items.what_it_does: Sets multiple variables in the executor's variables dictionary for use in test steps. Logs each key-value pair and updates the variables dictionary. Returns True.

items.name: substitute_variables
items.what_it_does: Replaces variable placeholders in text with actual values from the variables dictionary. Uses regex to find ${variable_name} patterns and replaces them. Supports dot notation for nested dictionary access (e.g., ${temp_id.status}).

items.name: execute_step
items.what_it_does: Central dispatcher that executes a single test step by routing to the appropriate action handler based on action type. Validates step dictionary, extracts action and page, updates current page, dispatches to action-specific methods (click, set, verify, navigate, etc.), handles sleep delays between steps, and returns result.
items.method_signature: def execute_step(self, step: Dict[str, Any]) -> None

items.name: execute_flow
items.what_it_does: Executes a complete test flow defined in YAML data. Validates YAML structure, iterates through all steps, executes each step with timing and error handling, collects results, generates CSV report with step-level timing and status, and prints execution summary.
items.method_signature: def execute_flow(self, yaml_data: Dict[str, Any], flow_result = None) -> None

items.name: load_json_metadata
items.what_it_does: Loads UI element metadata from a JSON file into the control_map dictionary. Splits page identifier to extract module and file name, looks up folder name in metadata dictionary, constructs JSON file path, reads and parses JSON file, and stores in control_map.

items.name: get_control
items.what_it_does: Searches for a UI control in the loaded metadata by matching its text or label_text. Iterates through control_map['interactive_elements'] and returns the control dictionary if text or label_text matches the provided name.

items.name: set_control_value
items.what_it_does: Sets a value in a UI control (input field or dropdown) using multiple locator strategies with fallback. Handles both text inputs (clear + send_keys) and select dropdowns (select by visible text or value). Tries CSS selectors, XPath selectors, and other strategies until one succeeds.

items.name: do_clicks
items.what_it_does: Performs the actual clicking of elements located by a specific strategy. Waits for elements to be present, iterates through found elements, checks display and enabled state, attempts click with exception handling, supports clicking multiple elements with delay, and returns success status.
items.method_signature: def do_clicks(self, strategy, multiple, timeout, delay=0.10)

items.name: load_yaml_file
items.what_it_does: Loads and parses a YAML file from the filesystem. Opens file with UTF-8 encoding, uses yaml.safe_load to parse content, returns parsed dictionary or empty dict if file is empty. Raises FileNotFoundError or ValueError on errors.
items.method_signature: def load_yaml_file(self, file_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]

items.name: driver
items.what_it_does: Pytest fixture with module scope that creates and manages a browser instance for the entire test module. Creates MultiBrowserManager, calls create_normal_browser with profile 'instantink', yields driver to test, and calls driver.quit() in cleanup.

items.name: test_case_execute
items.what_it_does: Main test function that executes a YAML-defined test case flow. Loads config, retrieves printer info, creates YamlStepExecutor, creates trace folder, sets global variables, loads YAML flow, and calls executor.execute_flow to run the test with result capture.

items.name: create_normal_browser
items.what_it_does: Creates a new Chrome browser instance in normal mode with extensive automation detection suppression. Adds arguments to hide automation indicators, configures preferences to disable credential service and notifications, creates Chrome WebDriver, stores driver in browsers registry with metadata, and returns driver instance.
items.method_signature: def create_normal_browser(self, profile_name: str, user_data_dir: str = None)

items.name: switch_to_window_by_url
items.what_it_does: Searches for and switches to the first window that contains or matches the specified URL across all browsers. Iterates through all browsers and windows, checks URL match (exact or partial), switches to matching window, sets current_browser, and returns dictionary with browser_name, window_handle, url, and driver.
items.method_signature: def switch_to_window_by_url(self, url_part: str, exact_match: bool = False)

items.name: YamlStepExecutor
items.what_it_does: Core test execution engine that processes YAML test definitions and executes test steps. Manages UI element metadata, handles variable substitution, executes various action types, integrates with AI vision models for visual verification, and tracks test execution results. Provides comprehensive framework for YAML-based test automation.

items.name: MultiBrowserManager
items.what_it_does: Manages multiple browser instances with different profiles and modes. Provides methods to create browsers, switch between them, bring windows to foreground, find windows by URL, wait for new windows, load URLs in specific browsers, and manage browser lifecycle. Supports OS-specific window management operations.

items.name: pause_plan
items.what_it_does: Pauses a subscription plan for a specified number of months from either Dashboard or Cancellation page. Creates OverviewPage and CancellationPage instances. If page_view is 'Dashboard', clicks overview_page.pause_plan_link. If page_view is 'Cancellation', clicks cancellation_page.pause_plan_link. Waits for pause_plan_modal to appear using .last locator. Clicks pause_plan_dropdown using .last locator to open it. Constructs selector for dropdown option with data-value matching months parameter. Clicks the months option. Clicks confirm_pause_plan button using .last locator. Waits for pause_plan_modal to be hidden. This completes the plan pause flow with month selection.

items.name: DashboardHelper
items.what_it_does: Static helper class providing comprehensive utility methods for dashboard and account management testing. Contains methods for dashboard access and navigation, plan verification and management, billing and payment operations supporting multiple payment gateways (PGS, 2CO) and methods (credit card, PayPal, direct debit, Google Pay, Apple Pay), address management, printer selection, savings calculator validation, session handling, and various dashboard feature testing. All methods are static and operate on page objects passed as parameters.

items.name: event_shift
items.what_it_does: Shifts subscription events forward in time by a specified number of days, used for time-based testing. Fills the subscription rollback field with the event_shift value and optionally creates a billing cycle after rollback. This is the backend equivalent of time manipulation.

items.name: submit_charge
items.what_it_does: Submits a charge for a billing cycle in Gemini Rails Admin. Accesses the 'Submit Charge' menu option, clicks the warning button to confirm, and verifies the success alert contains 'Billing cycle has been charged'.

items.name: access
items.what_it_does: Authenticates and accesses the Gemini Rails Admin interface. Navigates to the login URL, checks if already signed in, and performs login if needed.

items.name: access_tenant_page
items.what_it_does: Navigates to a specific tenant's page in Gemini Rails Admin by searching for their email address. Returns the tenant ID.

items.name: verify_rails_admin_info
items.what_it_does: Verifies that a specific field in Rails Admin contains the expected value with retry logic. Provides robust verification with automatic retries and page reloads.

items.name: start_enrollment_and_sign_in
items.what_it_does: Starts the enrollment process and signs in the user with retry logic. Handles enrollment start and sign-in with automatic retries until printer-selection page is reached.

items.name: select_printer
items.what_it_does: Selects a printer from the printer selection page by index and continues. Waits for printer selection page, clicks radio button, and clicks continue.

items.name: add_shipping
items.what_it_does: Fills and submits the shipping address form during enrollment. Retrieves address from GlobalState, fills all required fields including street, city, state, zip, phone, handles suggested address modal if it appears.
items.method_signature: def add_shipping(page, index=0, company_name=None, additional_check=False, callback=None)

items.name: GeminiRAHelper
items.what_it_does: Massive helper class containing 60+ static methods for comprehensive Gemini Rails Admin operations including tenant and subscription management, billing cycle operations, subscription state transitions, time shifting, billing charge submission, and extensive validation methods.

items.name: EnrollmentHelper
items.what_it_does: Comprehensive enrollment flow helper containing 100+ static methods that orchestrate the complete HP Instant Ink enrollment workflow including starting enrollment, signing in, selecting printers and plans, entering shipping and billing information, and finalizing enrollment.

items.name: EmailHelper
items.what_it_does: Email verification helper module providing utility methods for checking email delivery, extracting email content, and validating email subjects using Gmail API integration. Used in test scenarios where email verification is required.

items.name: verify_billing_table_data
items.what_it_does: Verifies that the billing table displays the correct total pages printed value. Retrieves the inner text of the total_pages_printed element, extracts numeric values, and asserts the first number equals the expected total_pages_printed parameter.

items.name: verify_previous_billing_cycle_period
items.what_it_does: Verifies that selecting a previous billing cycle period changes the display from 'Current' to a past period. Clicks the billing cycle dropdown, selects the first previous period option, and verifies the title no longer contains 'Current'.

items.name: get_billing_cycle_option
items.what_it_does: Selects a specific billing cycle period from the dropdown by index. Opens the billing cycle dropdown, selects the period based on index (1, 2, or 3), and verifies the table updates by checking print_history_table_button visibility.

items.name: verify_correct_billing_section
items.what_it_does: Verifies multiple fields in the billing section against expected values provided in a dictionary. Can verify total_pages_printed, pages, rollover, additional, plan_price, overage_price, previous, charges, tax, and total fields. Uses currency validation and number extraction for comprehensive billing data verification.

items.name: normalize_currency_value
items.what_it_does: Normalizes currency values to a consistent format for comparison. Handles various currency formats, symbols (dollar, euro, pound), removes spaces and commas, converts to float with 2 decimal places. Returns '0.00' for empty or N/A values.

items.name: validate_currency_field
items.what_it_does: Validates that a currency field contains the expected value with flexible matching options. Retrieves text from selector, normalizes both expected and actual values, supports exact or partial matching. Handles integer values as cents (divides by 100).

items.name: see_notification_on_print_history
items.what_it_does: Verifies that a specific notification text is present in the print history table. Expands the table if hidden, waits for content to load, retrieves table inner text, and asserts the notification text is present.

items.name: verify_plan_info
items.what_it_does: Verifies that the plan information displays the correct plan value and plan pages. Waits for print_history_card visibility, retrieves plan_price_text content, extracts numbers, and asserts first number equals plan_value and second equals plan_pages.
items.method_signature:
@staticmethod
def verify_plan_info(page, plan_value: str, plan_pages: str)

items.name: PrintHistoryHelper
items.what_it_does: Provides comprehensive static utility methods for testing and validating the print history and payment history page. Contains methods for selecting billing cycle periods, verifying billing table data, normalizing currency values, verifying billing sections, validating FAQs, downloading invoices, and verifying notifications.

items.name: access_page
items.what_it_does: Navigates to a specific page by clicking on a navigation link with the specified page_name text. Uses an XPath selector to locate an anchor element with class 'nav-link' whose normalized text content exactly matches the provided page_name.

items.name: wait_page_to_load
items.what_it_does: Waits for a specific page to fully load by checking for the presence of an h1 heading element containing the text 'Details for {page_title}'. Uses Playwright's wait_for_selector with a dynamic selector pattern. Default timeout is 60 seconds.

items.name: get_item_by_title
items.what_it_does: Locates and returns a card body element by searching for a card with a specific title in its header. Constructs a CSS selector that matches div.card elements containing h5.card-header with exact text matching the title. Returns a locator for the card body element. Waits up to 10 seconds if card not immediately found.

items.name: get_field_text_by_title
items.what_it_does: Retrieves the text content from a field within a card section identified by its title. First calls get_item_by_title to locate the card body, then extracts all visible text content using inner_text() and strips whitespace. Returns the cleaned text string.

items.name: doesnt_see_free_months
items.what_it_does: Verifies that free trial information is not displayed on the update plan page. Uses Playwright's expect() assertion to verify that free_trial_info_card and free_trial_plan_details elements are not visible. This is used in test scenarios where the user should not see free trial offers.

items.name: __getattr__
items.what_it_does: Intercepts attribute access on page objects to dynamically convert locator names into Playwright locator objects. When code accesses self.login_button, this method retrieves the selector string from self.elements and returns page.locator(selector_string). This enables clean syntax like self.login_button.click() instead of self.page.locator(self.elements.login_button).click().

items.name: RABaseHelper
items.what_it_does: Provides comprehensive set of static utility methods for Resque job management, page navigation, and data extraction from card-based UI layouts. Contains methods for accessing Resque admin, running scheduled jobs, waiting for job completion, navigating to pages and menus, extracting field data by title, accessing links, validating boolean values, and validating template data with date comparisons.

items.name: click_print_history
items.what_it_does: Clicks the Print and Payment History menu item in the side navigation to navigate to the history page. Calls self._click_with_instant_ink_expansion(self.print_history_menu_link) which automatically handles mobile menu expansion and Instant Ink parent menu expansion if needed before clicking the Print History link.

items.name: get_page_title
items.what_it_does: Waits for page title element to be present with configurable timeout. Returns element locator once page loads.

items.name: faq_update_plan_link
items.what_it_does: Property that returns Playwright Locator for FAQ update plan link element

items.name: plan_price_text
items.what_it_does: Property that returns Playwright Locator for plan price description text element

items.name: create_virtual_printer
items.what_it_does: Creates a virtual printer using the G2 simulator API through a multi-step process with retry logic. POSTs to simulator printers endpoint to create printer. Registers printer with cloud. Gets claim postcard and device fingerprint. Returns PrinterData tuple with all printer details.

items.name: create_and_claim_virtual_printer
items.what_it_does: Creates and claims a virtual printer in one operation. Gets org_aware_token, creates virtual printer, claims printer to tenant, waits 600 seconds for availability. Returns PrinterData object.

items.name: claim_virtual_printer
items.what_it_does: Claims a virtual printer to a tenant account using UCDE API with retry logic. POSTs autoClaimRequest to UCDE devices endpoint. Retries up to 10 times on failure.
items.method_signature: def claim_virtual_printer(org_token, tenant_id, model_number, device_uuid, postcard, fingerprint)

items.name: get_org_aware_token
items.what_it_does: Obtains an organization-aware user access token through multi-step token exchange. Gets Gemini token, queries user details, gets tenant details, gets Stratus token, performs token exchange. Returns tuple of (org_token, tenant_id).

items.name: get_offer_code
items.what_it_does: Generates an offer code for the current test country based on offer type and amount filters. Gets country code, finds matching offer, generates POSA code via API. Returns the code.
items.method_signature: def get_offer_code(offer_type: str = 'free', amount_equal: int = None, amount_greater: int = None, amount_less: int = None) -> str

items.name: get_filtered_plan_data
items.what_it_does: Retrieves plans filtered by a specific attribute value. Gets all plans from API, filters by key/value, returns matching plans.

items.name: subscription_data_from_gemini
items.what_it_does: Retrieves detailed subscription data from Gemini API for a specific subscription ID. Gets token, makes GET request, returns full subscription JSON.

items.name: get_subscription_state
items.what_it_does: Retrieves the subscription state for a specific subscription ID. Calls subscription_data_from_gemini() and extracts subscriptionState from nested JSON path. Returns state string.

items.name: validate_subscription_state
items.what_it_does: Validates that a subscription reaches the expected state within 60 seconds. Polls get_subscription_state() every second. Asserts final state equals expected_state.

items.name: send_rtp_devicestatus
items.what_it_does: Sends RTP device status message to simulator to trigger supply level updates and impression count reporting. Constructs binary payload with counters, encodes to base64, loads template JSON, replaces placeholders, PUTs to simulator endpoint.

items.name: printer_colors
items.what_it_does: Returns the list of cartridge colors for the current printer based on its supply variant. Returns ['CMY', 'K'] for IPH or ['K', 'C', 'M', 'Y'] for IIC.

items.name: extract_numbers_from_text
items.what_it_does: Extracts all numbers (integers and decimals) from a text string. Uses regex to find decimal numbers and integers. Returns list of matched number strings.

items.name: find_field_text_by_header
items.what_it_does: Extracts text content from a card body by finding the card header. Calls find_card_body_by_header() to locate card body. Gets inner_text() and strips whitespace. Returns cleaned text.

items.name: find_card_body_by_header
items.what_it_does: Finds a card body element by locating its header text. Locates elements with class 'card-header' matching header_text. Navigates up to card container. Locates '.card-body' within container. Returns card body locator.

items.name: get_font_details
items.what_it_does: Extracts comprehensive font and text styling details from an element. Uses element.evaluate() to get computed styles. Returns dictionary with font-family, font-size, font-weight, color, background-color, and other CSS properties.

items.name: get_plan_cards_details
items.what_it_does: Extracts CSS styling details from a plan card element. Uses element.evaluate() to get computed styles. Returns dictionary with 'border-radius' and 'margin' CSS properties.

items.name: verify_font_details_property_value
items.what_it_does: Verifies that a specific CSS property of an element has the expected value. Calls get_font_details() to get styling. Extracts property value. Asserts actual equals expected. Returns actual value.

items.name: is_element_actionable
items.what_it_does: Checks if an element is actionable (clickable and not obscured). Gets bounding box, calculates center point, uses document.elementFromPoint() to check if element is at that point. Returns True if actionable, False otherwise.

items.name: setup
items.what_it_does: Initializes the test framework by calling set_globals() with configuration values from GlobalState. Reads stack, printer_profile, country, payment_method, etc. Creates 'temp' directory for temporary files.

items.name: set_globals
items.what_it_does: Sets all global module-level configuration variables from args dictionary. Extracts stack, profile, country info, display settings, payment config. Loads stack configuration from STACK_CONFIG to set all environment URLs and secrets. Initializes MongoDB and S3 config.

items.name: generate_tenant_email
items.what_it_does: Generates a unique email address for test tenant creation by appending random 8-character alphanumeric suffix to 'hello.instantink+' and '@gmail.com'. Stores in global _tenant_email and returns it.

items.name: retry_operation
items.what_it_does: Generic retry wrapper that executes an operation function with automatic retry logic. Attempts operation up to max_attempts times. Logs each attempt. On success returns result. On failure waits delay seconds and retries. Optionally calls on_retry callback before each retry.
items.method_signature: def retry_operation(operation, operation_name='Operation', max_attempts=5, delay=2, on_retry=None)

items.name: printer_data
items.what_it_does: Retrieves printer SKU data from Agena API for current country and derivative model. Constructs Agena printer_skus URL. Gets Gemini token. Makes GET request. Returns printer SKU information JSON.

items.name: get_plans_data
items.what_it_does: Retrieves all available Instant Ink plans for current country from Agena API. Constructs Agena plans URL with country, program='i_ink', obsolete='false'. Gets Gemini token. Makes GET request. Returns list of plans.

items.name: billing_status_code
items.what_it_does: Returns the expected billing status code based on current payment method. Checks payment method type and gateway. Returns appropriate status code like 'CPT-100', 'STRATUS-PAYMENT-COMPLETE', 'DIRECT-DEBIT-SUCCESS', etc.

items.name: payment_engine
items.what_it_does: Returns the payment engine name based on current payment method. Checks payment method type and gateway. Returns 'payment_gateway', 'stratus', 'pgs_direct_debit', 'pgs_pay_pal', or 'pegasus'.

items.name: PrinterData
items.what_it_does: Named tuple class for storing virtual printer data including entity_id, model_number, device_uuid, cloud_id, postcard, and fingerprint. Extends tuple to provide both indexed and named attribute access. Used to pass printer details between creation, registration, and claiming functions.

items.name: OFFERS_DATA
items.constant_value: JSON data loaded from offers.json file

items.name: locale_map.json
items.constant_value: Country locale configuration with 38 countries, regions, languages, payment gateways

items.name: offers.json
items.constant_value: Offer configuration with prepaid and free offers for 13 countries

items.name: payment_method_data.json
items.constant_value: Payment method test data with credit cards, direct debit, PayPal, Google Pay credentials

items.name: printer_profiles.json
items.constant_value: Printer profile configuration with 13 models, regional SKUs, supply variants

components_to_create.description: NOT in codebase. Must be created.

items.description: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.
items.expected_result: Print and Payment History page is loaded

items.description: Print some pages(less than the plan, such as 6 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
items.expected_result: Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is filled with the black color and the value is displayed as correct (such as "6 of 10 used").

items.description: Continue to print some pages(more than the plan, such as 15 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
items.expected_result: Verify the progress bars for "Complimentary pages" and "Additional pages" are displayed well.
Verify the progress bar is filled with the Yellow color and the value is displayed correctly(such as "5 of 10 used").

items.description: Check the icon. For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
items.expected_result: Verify the info icon is displayed well behind the string "Additional pages". Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.

items.description: Check the message below "Additional pages". Check the Complimentary pages progress bar. Check total pages printed info.
items.expected_result: Verify a message with the amount of blocks already bought is displayed well. Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is full filled with the black color and the value is displayed correctly (such as "10 of 10 used"). Verify correct number(such as 15 pages) displayed according to the printed pages.

items.description: Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
items.expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is not displayed.

items.description: Even shift 32 days and trigger billing charge.
items.expected_result: Time shift and billing charge successful

items.description: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.
Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
items.expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is displayed well.
Verify the Complimentary pages progress bar is displayed well.

items.description: For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
items.expected_result: Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.
Verify the value is displayed as "0 of 10(Pause Plan) used".
Verify the information with correct plan info is displayed well.

items.description: Action: Print some pages(less than the plan, such as 6 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
notes: No API methods found for simulating page printing. No page refresh methods found in this batch.
No methods found for simulating page printing via API or for refreshing the page.

items.description: Action: Continue to print some pages(more than the plan, such as 15 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
notes: No API methods for page printing or page refresh found in this batch.
No methods found for printing additional pages or refreshing the page.

items.description: Action: Check the icon. For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
notes: No additional pages info icon locators or interaction methods found in this batch.
No methods found for responsive icon interactions.

items.description: Action: For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
notes: No info icon locators or tooltip interaction methods found in this batch. The Enroll.json file mentions a billing-card-tooltip but not for complimentary pages info icon.
No methods found for hover or click interactions with info icons. No responsive interaction methods found in this batch.

items.description: Action: Check the message below "Complimentary pages".
notes: No locators or methods found for complimentary pages info message.
No methods found for locating the info message below Complimentary pages.
